details.test: Task 2: Promote largest high-volume product sitemap to high crawl priority
Task 3: Add recent high-priority blog URLs to Monitoring list
Task 4: Create a new marketing sitemap entry with weekly change frequency
Task 5: Archive the month-based category sitemap with fewer URLs
Task 6: Group all active high-volume video sitemaps into a new group
Task 7: Mark low-priority clearance product URLs as noindex
Task 8: Downgrade change frequency from daily to weekly for dormant sitemaps
Task 9: Separate 404 and 301 URLs from product-errors sitemap into two lists
